    @allure.title("Add items under max_price to cart")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    @allure.testcase("https://your-jira.atlassian.net/browse/TN-301", "TN-301")
    def test_add_items_to_cart(self, cart_flow_pages: CartFlowPages):
        search_data = get_test_data("search")
        query = search_data["query"]
        max_price = search_data["max_price"]
        limit = search_data["limit"]
    
        with allure.step(f"Find products matching '{query}' under ${max_price}"):
            products = cart_flow_pages.search_results.get_products_under_price(
                query=query, max_price=max_price, limit=limit
            )
    
        allure.attach(
            "\n".join(f"{p.name} — ${p.price}" for p in products),
            name="Products to add",
            attachment_type=allure.attachment_type.TEXT,
        )
    
        assert products, (
            f"No products found for query='{query}' under ${max_price}. "
            "Cannot add to cart."
        )
    
        with allure.step(f"Add {len(products)} product(s) to cart"):
            added = cart_flow_pages.search_results.add_items_to_cart(products)
    
        with allure.step("Verify all selected products were added"):
            assert len(added) == len(products), (
                f"Expected {len(products)} items added, got {len(added)}"
            )
    
        with allure.step("Open cart and verify item count"):
            cart_flow_pages.cart.open()
            assert not cart_flow_pages.cart.is_empty(), "Cart is empty after adding items"
            item_count = cart_flow_pages.cart.get_item_count()

                f"Expected {len(products)} cart item(s), got {item_count}"
            )

b1e65c647af4f566262e36bed77b85ca.d41d8cd.message:
XFAIL VULNERABILITY: POST /index.php?route=common/currency/currency with redirect=https://evil.com returns Location: https://evil.com — unvalidated open redirect allows phishing and credential-harvesting attacks

AssertionError: Open redirect confirmed: Location: 'https://evil.example.com/phishing' — server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist

    https://evil.example.com/phishing

self = <test_pentest.TestPentestFindings object at 0x7f107c0c8b60>
session = <services.rest_client.RestClient object at 0x7f10767f1a90>
api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo'

    @allure.title(
        "FINDING: Open redirect via redirect parameter in currency endpoint is blocked"
    )
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    @pytest.mark.xfail(
        strict=False,
        reason=(
            "VULNERABILITY: POST /index.php?route=common/currency/currency with "
            "redirect=https://evil.com returns Location: https://evil.com — "
            "unvalidated open redirect allows phishing and credential-harvesting attacks"
        ),
    )
    def test_open_redirect_via_currency_redirect_parameter_is_blocked(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        external_url = "https://evil.example.com/phishing"
    
        with allure.step(
            f"POST currency/currency with external redirect={external_url!r}"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: POST common/currency/currency with redirect=%s", external_url
            )
            resp = session.post(
                f"{api_base_url}/index.php",
                params={"route": _CURRENCY_ROUTE},
                data={"code": "USD", "redirect": external_url},
                allow_redirects=False,
            )
    
        with allure.step(
            "Assert Location header stays within the site domain (no external redirect)"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert Location does not point to evil.example.com; got: %s",
                resp.headers.get("Location", ""),
            )
            location = resp.headers.get("Location", "")
>           assert "evil.example.com" not in location, (
                f"Open redirect confirmed: Location: {location!r} — "
                "server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist"
            )
E           AssertionError: Open redirect confirmed: Location: 'https://evil.example.com/phishing' — server must validate redirect URLs against an allowlist
E           assert 'evil.example.com' not in 'https://evi...com/phishing'
E             
E             'evil.example.com' is contained here:
E               https://evil.example.com/phishing
